commands.author: riosbotchen-source
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=73ced42b1736d2a94915ca29fea6c5d481b519e6)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a top-level `runtimeContext` config shape, a core `runtime` tool, hidden prompt/session injection, docs, tool-policy registration, generated config baselines, and focused tests.

PR surface: Source +845, Tests +425, Docs +162, Config +2, Generated 0. Total +1434 across 26 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review findings by source inspection: prompt-only callers do not pass `transcriptPrompt`, while the PR only appends runtime context when that field exists; the formatter also counts `stopping` offload targets as available. I did not run the PR tests in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - The remaining blockers are narrow mechanical fixes in prompt assembly and runtime summary rendering; maintainer product review should still follow those fixes.
commands.reason: comment version already processed in ledger
